news.title: Voor de tweede keer was chef Thomas (42) er niet bij toen hij een Michelinster kreeg: “Plots hoorde ik gegil in de keuken” - Nieuwsblad
news.summary:
# Summary

Chef Thomas, 42, has earned a Michelin star for the second time in his career, but was notably absent when the award was announced—learning the news through excited screaming from his kitchen staff. This achievement highlights his restaurant's culinary excellence and consistent quality, making it a noteworthy dining destination for visitors seeking high-end gastronomy in the city. The story underscores both the prestige of Michelin recognition and the collaborative nature of fine dining kitchens.
